name: frontend-components
author: coreyja
description: Design reusable, composable UI components with single responsibility, clear interfaces, and proper state management. Use this skill when creating or refactoring React, Vue, Svelte, or other framework components. When defining component props, interfaces, or APIs. When managing component state or lifting state up to parent components. When building reusable UI elements like buttons, cards, forms, modals, or lists. When implementing component composition patterns. When working with component files (.jsx, .tsx, .vue, .svelte). When documenting component usage or creating component libraries.

name: frontend-css
author: coreyja
description: Write maintainable CSS following the project's established methodology, whether using Tailwind utility classes, BEM naming, CSS modules, or styled-components. Use this skill when styling UI components or pages with CSS, applying design system tokens for colors and spacing, or working with CSS frameworks. When writing utility classes, custom styles, or responsive design rules. When working with .css, .scss, .module.css files, or inline styles in JSX/templates. When establishing or maintaining design tokens for consistent styling. When optimizing CSS for production builds with purging or tree-shaking unused styles.

name: frontend-responsive
author: coreyja
description: Build responsive layouts that work seamlessly across mobile, tablet, and desktop screen sizes using mobile-first development, fluid layouts, and relative units. Use this skill when implementing layouts or UI components that need to adapt to different screen sizes. When setting up breakpoints, media queries, or responsive utilities. When using relative units (rem, em, %) instead of fixed pixels. When ensuring touch-friendly tap targets and optimizing for mobile performance. When testing UI changes across multiple device sizes. When implementing responsive typography, images, or navigation patterns.

name: global-coding-style
author: coreyja
description: Maintain consistent code formatting, naming conventions, and structure across the entire codebase with automated tools and clear standards. Use this skill when writing any code in any language or framework. When naming variables, functions, classes, or files. When formatting code with proper indentation and line breaks. When refactoring code to remove duplication or extract reusable functions. When running linters or formatters to ensure consistency. When removing dead code, unused imports, or commented-out blocks. When applying DRY principles to avoid code duplication. This skill applies universally to all programming tasks.

name: global-commenting
author: coreyja
description: Write self-documenting code with clear naming and structure, adding minimal, evergreen comments only when necessary to explain complex logic. Use this skill when writing or reviewing any code that might need comments. When refactoring code to make it more self-explanatory through better naming and structure. When deciding whether to add or remove comments from existing code. When ensuring comments explain why something is done rather than what is being done. When reviewing code to remove outdated or temporary change-related comments. This skill applies to all programming languages and all types of code files.

name: global-conventions
author: coreyja
description: Follow established project structure, version control practices, documentation standards, and development workflows to maintain consistency across the team. Use this skill when organizing files and directories in a project. When writing README documentation or contributing guidelines. When creating git commits with clear messages or pull request descriptions. When managing environment configuration or dependencies. When setting up feature flags or maintaining changelogs. When establishing code review processes or testing requirements. This skill applies to all project management and development workflow tasks.

name: global-error-handling
author: coreyja
description: Implement robust error handling with user-friendly messages, specific exception types, centralized error boundaries, and graceful degradation strategies. Use this skill when implementing error handling logic in any part of the application. When writing try-catch blocks, error boundaries, or exception handlers. When validating input and failing fast with clear error messages. When handling API errors, network failures, or external service timeouts. When implementing retry strategies with exponential backoff. When ensuring resources are properly cleaned up in finally blocks. When displaying error messages to users without exposing technical details. This skill applies to all error handling across frontend and backend code.

name: global-tech-stack
author: coreyja
description: Reference and maintain knowledge of the project's technical stack including frameworks, languages, databases, testing tools, and third-party services. Use this skill when making architectural decisions about which technologies to use. When adding new dependencies or integrating third-party services. When setting up development environments or deployment infrastructure. When choosing between different libraries or frameworks for a feature. When documenting the technology choices made in the project. When onboarding new team members to understand the tech stack. This skill helps ensure technology choices align with the established stack and provides a reference for all technical decisions.

name: global-validation
author: coreyja
description: Implement secure, comprehensive input validation on both client and server sides using allowlists, type checking, and sanitization to prevent injection attacks. Use this skill when handling user input from forms, API requests, or any external data source. When implementing form validation logic with field-specific error messages. When validating data types, formats, ranges, and required fields. When sanitizing input to prevent SQL injection, XSS, or command injection. When validating business rules like sufficient balance or valid date ranges. When implementing both client-side validation for user experience and mandatory server-side validation for security.

name: testing-test-writing
author: coreyja
description: Write focused tests for core user flows and critical business logic, testing behavior rather than implementation, with clear names and fast execution. Use this skill when writing unit tests, integration tests, or end-to-end tests. When testing critical user workflows and primary application features. When creating tests that focus on what code does rather than how it does it. When mocking external dependencies like databases, APIs, or file systems. When naming tests to clearly describe the scenario and expected outcome. When keeping tests fast and independent. When completing feature implementation and adding strategic tests at logical completion points. When working with test files or test frameworks.

name: agent-browser
author: countbot-ai
description: Browser automation CLI for AI agents. Use when the user needs to interact with websites, including navigating pages, filling forms, clicking buttons, taking screenshots, extracting data, testing web apps, or automating any browser task. Triggers include requests to "open a website", "fill out a form", "click a button", "take a screenshot", "scrape data from a page", "test this web app", "login to a site", "automate browser actions", or any task requiring programmatic web interaction.

name: baidu-search
author: countbot-ai
description: 百度 AI 搜索。支持网页搜索、百度百科、秒懂百科、AI 智能生成四种模式。自动包含当前日期上下文。当用户要求搜索信息、查询百科、获取最新资讯、搜索新闻、查找资料时使用。

name: cron-manager
author: countbot-ai
description: 定时任务管理。创建、查看、修改、删除定时任务，管理任务会话数据。当用户需要设置提醒、定时执行任务、管理调度计划时使用。

name: email
author: countbot-ai
description: 通过 QQ 或 163 邮箱发送和接收邮件。支持发送普通邮件、带附件邮件、接收邮件、检查新邮件。当用户要求发送邮件、查看邮件、检查新邮件时使用。

name: image-analysis
author: countbot-ai
description: 图片分析与识别，可分析本地图片、网络图片、视频、文件。适用于 OCR、物体识别、场景理解等。当用户发送图片或要求分析图片时必须使用此技能。

name: image-gen
author: countbot-ai
description: AI 图片生成。通过 ModelScope API 生成图片，支持文生图、异步任务轮询、LoRA 风格叠加、自定义尺寸。当用户要求生成图片、画图、创建插画、制作海报配图时使用。

name: map
author: countbot-ai
description: 高德地图路线规划与 POI 搜索。支持驾车、步行、骑行、公交路线规划，以及景点、餐厅搜索。当用户询问路线、行程规划、景点推荐、餐厅推荐时使用。

name: news
author: countbot-ai
description: 新闻与资讯查询。获取中文新闻和全球 AI 技术资讯，支持按分类查询（时政、财经、科技、社会、国际、体育、娱乐、AI 技术、AI 社区）。当用户询问最新新闻、AI 动态、行业资讯时使用。

name: weather
author: countbot-ai
description: 天气查询与预报。支持全球城市天气查询、多日预报、详细气象数据。无需 API Key。当用户询问天气、气温、是否下雨、穿衣建议、出行天气等场景时使用。JSON 输出已优化，只返回关键信息。

name: web-design
author: countbot-ai
description: 网页设计与部署。生成精美的单页 HTML 网页（报告、落地页、数据可视化等），支持一键部署到 Cloudflare Pages。使用 Tailwind CSS + Chart.js + Font Awesome 技术栈。当用户要求制作网页、生成报告页面、创建落地页、数据可视化展示、部署网页到线上时使用。

name: ai-component-metadata
author: cris-achiardi
description: Generate AI-ready metadata for design system components to enable intelligent UI generation. Analyzes component structure and generates structured metadata that helps AI understand when and how to use components correctly. Useful for teams building AI-consumable design systems.

name: ai-ds-composer
author: cris-achiardi
description: Strategic guide for consuming design system metadata to compose components intelligently. Use when generating or modifying UI components and layouts to ensure component reuse, proper variant selection, and adherence to design system patterns. Helps Claude understand project structure, read hierarchical metadata indexes, apply anti-pattern rules, and flag when existing components don't fit a requirement.

name: codebase-index
author: cris-achiardi
description: Automatically generate relationship and dependency maps for any component-based codebase (React, Vue, Svelte, Astro, Next.js, Angular, Solid). Auto-detects framework. Supports TOON format for 30-60% token savings. Use when indexing codebases, mapping component relationships, documenting dependencies, or understanding unfamiliar projects. Generates JSON/TOON files mapping component usage, imports, npm dependencies, utilities, CSS, and data queries.

name: crazy-8s
author: cris-achiardi
description: Solo rapid ideation method based on Google Design Sprint Crazy 8's exercise. Generates 8 distinct solution ideas in 8 minutes through rapid-fire ideation or sketch documentation. Use when working alone and need to explore multiple solution directions quickly, push beyond first obvious ideas, or generate variety before converging. Includes creativity warm-up questions, built-in timer, optional creative constraints, and generates visual HTML/CSS prototypes plus comparison table. NOT for team sessions (traditional Crazy 8's works better for teams).

name: figma-variables-generator
author: cris-achiardi
description: Generate JSON files for creating Figma variable collections from text descriptions or design token data. Use when designers need to create or convert design tokens (colors, spacing, typography, etc.) into Figma variables format. Supports multiple modes (Light/Dark), code syntax definitions, variable references/aliases, and hierarchical organization. Triggers include requests to "create Figma variables", "generate variables JSON", "convert design tokens", or working with design system tokens.

name: problem-mapping
author: cris-achiardi
description: Foundational problem framing for design sprints and product strategy. Based on Google Design Sprint "Understand" phase methodology. Use when teams need to establish shared understanding before ideation - defining problem statements, identifying users/stakeholders, setting success criteria, documenting constraints and assumptions, and capturing pain points. Works in solo, team synchronous, or team asynchronous modes. Creates structured problem map document as foundation for HMW exercises and solution generation.

name: crowi-migration
author: crowi
description:
Crowi 2.0 移行ワークフロー。Express/Swig から Next.js + ts-rest への移行時に自動適用。
キーワード: migrate, 移行, Express, Swig, legacy, 旧実装

name: binary-triage
author: cyberkaida
description: Performs initial binary triage by surveying memory layout, strings, imports/exports, and functions to quickly understand what a binary does and identify suspicious behavior. Use when first examining a binary, when user asks to triage/survey/analyze a program, or wants an overview before deeper reverse engineering.

name: ctf-crypto
author: cyberkaida
description: Solve CTF cryptography challenges by identifying, analyzing, and exploiting weak crypto implementations in binaries to extract keys or decrypt data. Use for custom ciphers, weak crypto, key extraction, or algorithm identification.

name: ctf-pwn
author: cyberkaida
description: Solve CTF binary exploitation challenges by discovering and exploiting memory corruption vulnerabilities to read flags. Use for buffer overflows, format strings, heap exploits, ROP challenges, or any pwn/exploitation task.

name: ctf-rev
author: cyberkaida
description: Solve CTF reverse engineering challenges using systematic analysis to find flags, keys, or passwords. Use for crackmes, binary bombs, key validators, obfuscated code, algorithm recovery, or any challenge requiring program comprehension to extract hidden information.

name: deep-analysis
author: cyberkaida
description: Performs focused, depth-first investigation of specific reverse engineering questions through iterative analysis and database improvement. Answers questions like "What does this function do?", "Does this use crypto?", "What's the C2 address?", "Fix types in this function". Makes incremental improvements (renaming, retyping, commenting) to aid understanding. Returns evidence-based answers with new investigation threads. Use after binary-triage for investigating specific suspicious areas or when user asks focused questions about binary behavior.

name: command-executor
author: d-oit
description: Executes safe commands and captures real output to extend command-verify functionality. Only runs when explicitly requested. Use when asked to actually run commands, execute commands, test if commands work, or verify commands actually execute.

name: command-verify
author: d-oit
description: Intelligent command verification for documentation. Discovers all commands in markdown files, validates them using git diff-based cache invalidation, and ensures documentation accuracy with zero token cost after initial setup. Use when asked to verify commands, check documentation, or validate command references.

name: github-repo-management
author: d-oit
description: Manage GitHub repositories for Claude Code plugins including issues, pull requests, releases, CI/CD workflows, and GitHub Actions. Use when working with GitHub repository management, creating releases, setting up CI/CD, managing issues or pull requests.

name: plugin-creator
author: d-oit
description: Create comprehensive Claude Code plugins with proper structure, commands, agents, hooks, and marketplace configuration. Use when the user wants to build a new Claude Code plugin or asks how to create/structure a plugin.

name: shell-script-quality
author: d-oit
description: Lint and test shell scripts using ShellCheck and BATS. Use when checking bash/sh scripts for errors, writing shell script tests, fixing ShellCheck warnings, setting up CI/CD for shell scripts, or improving bash code quality.

name: web-research
author: d-oit
description: Research web content, documentation, and best practices using the gemini-search agent for token-efficient searches with caching. Use when you need to fetch documentation, research best practices, or gather information from the web.

name: web-search-patterns
author: d-oit
description: Best practices and patterns for effective web searching

name: 3d-visualizer
author: daffy0208
description: Expert in Three.js, 3D graphics, and interactive 3D visualizations
description_zh: 一个专注于使用Three.js和React Three Fiber创建3D图形、交互式可视化和沉浸式网页体验的Claude技能。它协助进行3D建模、数据可视化、动画制作和产品配置器构建。

name: accessibility-engineer
author: daffy0208
description: Implement accessibility (a11y) best practices to make applications usable by everyone. Use when building UIs, conducting accessibility audits, or ensuring WCAG compliance. Covers screen readers, keyboard navigation, ARIA attributes, and inclusive design patterns.
description_zh: 一项用于在应用程序中实施无障碍（a11y）最佳实践的技能，涵盖WCAG合规性、语义化HTML、键盘导航、ARIA属性和包容性设计，以确保所有用户（包括残障人士）的可用性。

name: animation-designer
author: daffy0208
description: Expert in web animations, transitions, and motion design using Framer Motion and CSS
description_zh: 该Claude技能专注于使用Framer Motion和CSS创建流畅、专业的网页动画与动效设计。它提供专家指导和代码示例，用于实现UI动画、过渡效果和微交互。

name: api-designer
author: daffy0208
description: Design REST and GraphQL APIs. Use when creating backend APIs, defining API contracts, or integrating third-party services. Covers endpoint design, authentication, versioning, documentation, and best practices.
description_zh: 此技能通过提供端点设计、认证、版本控制、文档和开发者体验的最佳实践，帮助设计健壮的REST和GraphQL API。涵盖命名规范、HTTP语义、状态码和响应格式。

name: api-integration-builder
author: daffy0208
description: Build reliable third-party API integrations including OAuth, webhooks, rate limiting, error handling, and data sync. Use when integrating with external services (Slack, Stripe, Gmail, etc.), building API connections, handling webhooks, or implementing OAuth flows.
description_zh: 该技能提供构建第三方API集成的指导，涵盖认证（OAuth、API密钥）、错误处理、速率限制、Webhook和数据同步，以确保与外部服务的可靠连接。

name: archon-manager
author: daffy0208
description: Master Archon MCP for strategic project management, task tracking, and knowledge base operations. The strategic layer (WHAT/WHEN) that coordinates with Skills (HOW). Use when managing projects, tracking tasks, querying knowledge bases, or implementing the Archon+Skills two-layer architecture.
description_zh: 这是一个用于AI助手的战略性项目管理技能，协调构建内容和时间，处理任务跟踪、优先级工作流和知识库查询，采用与战术技能结合的两层架构。

name: asset-manager
author: daffy0208
description: Organize design assets, optimize images and fonts, maintain brand asset libraries, implement version control for assets, and enforce naming conventions. Keep design assets organized and production-ready.
description_zh: 该技能帮助组织和优化设计资产，包括图像、字体和图标。它提供结构化目录、命名规范和自动化脚本，确保资产生产就绪并受版本控制。

name: audio-producer
author: daffy0208
description: Expert in web audio, audio processing, and interactive sound design
description_zh: 该Claude技能专注于网页音频开发，提供构建自定义音频播放器、实现音频处理效果以及为网页应用创建交互式声音体验的专业知识。

name: bmad-method
author: daffy0208
description: Business Model and Architecture Design methodology for aligning technical architecture with business model sustainability and scalability
description_zh: 一种将技术架构与商业模式可持续性和可扩展性对齐的方法论，确保技术决策支持长期业务目标和成本效益增长。

name: brand-designer
author: daffy0208
description: Expert in brand identity, logo design, and visual brand systems
description_zh: 此技能协助创建全面的品牌标识，包括徽标设计、配色方案、字体系统和品牌指南。它提供了品牌探索、概念开发和视觉资产创建的结构化流程。

name: capability-graph-builder
author: daffy0208
description: Build queryable capability graphs from manifests using Codex for relationship inference between skills, resources, and capabilities.
description_zh: 该技能从清单文件构建可查询的能力图谱，利用AI推断技能、资源和能力之间的关系并验证依赖，用于编排规划。

name: codex-review-workflow
author: daffy0208
description: Automated code review workflow using OpenAI Codex CLI. Implements iterative fix-and-review cycles until code passes validation or reaches iteration limit. Use when building features requiring automated code validation, security checks, or quality assurance through Codex CLI.
description_zh: 使用OpenAI Codex CLI的自动化代码审查工作流，通过迭代修复与审查循环来验证代码质量、安全性和最佳实践。

name: context-preserver
author: daffy0208
description: Automatically save and restore development context to minimize cognitive load when resuming work. Use when switching tasks, taking breaks, or returning after interruptions. Captures mental state, file locations, and next steps. Designed for ADHD developers with high context-switching costs.
description_zh: 该技能自动保存和恢复开发者的心智与技术上下文（如当前文件、思路和后续步骤），以最大限度地减少中断或休息后的重新适应时间，尤其适合ADHD开发者。

name: copywriter
author: daffy0208
description: Expert in writing compelling copy for web, marketing, and product
description_zh: 此技能专注于为UX写作、营销材料和产品内容撰写清晰且具有说服力的文案，包括按钮标签、错误信息、落地页和文档等。

name: customer-support-builder
author: daffy0208
description: Build scalable customer support systems including help centers, chatbots, ticketing systems, and self-service knowledge bases. Use when designing support infrastructure, reducing support load, improving customer satisfaction, or scaling support without linear hiring.
description_zh: 此技能帮助构建可扩展的客户支持系统，包括知识库、聊天机器人和工单系统，旨在提升客户满意度并随着业务增长降低支持负担。

name: dark-matter-analyzer
author: daffy0208
description: Analyze repositories to reveal unseen patterns, strategic drift, and organizational health. Use when assessing repository coherence, diagnosing project issues, identifying documentation inflation, or understanding why a codebase feels misaligned with its stated goals.
description_zh: 分析代码仓库以揭示隐藏的模式、战略偏差和组织健康问题，超越标准指标，帮助诊断项目为何感觉偏离轨道。

name: data-engineer
author: daffy0208
description: Expert in data pipelines, ETL processes, and data infrastructure
description_zh: 该Claude技能协助构建和管理数据管道、ETL流程及数据基础设施，包括数据提取、转换、加载和分析，用于建立稳健的数据工作流。

name: data-visualizer
author: daffy0208
description: Expert in creating charts, dashboards, and data visualizations using modern libraries
description_zh: 一项专注于使用Recharts、Chart.js和D3.js等现代库创建交互式图表、仪表盘和数据可视化的技能，侧重于数据叙事和响应式设计。

name: deployment-advisor
author: daffy0208
description: Choose deployment strategy and infrastructure. Use when deciding where to deploy applications, setting up CI/CD, or configuring production environments. Covers Vercel, Railway, AWS, Cloudflare Workers, and Docker.
description_zh: 该技能为应用程序提供部署策略和基础设施选择建议，根据项目规模、成本和技术需求，涵盖从Vercel到AWS等平台。

name: design-system-architect
author: daffy0208
description: Build scalable, maintainable design systems that unify product experiences. Use when creating component libraries, design tokens, or establishing design standards. Covers atomic design, Storybook, theming, and design system governance.
description_zh: 此技能帮助构建可扩展的设计系统，包括可复用组件、设计令牌和治理流程。涵盖原子设计原则、Storybook集成、主题化以及跨产品的一致性维护。

name: figma-developer
author: daffy0208
description: Extract components from Figma, convert designs to React components, sync design tokens, and generate code from designs. Bridge the gap between design and code with automated workflows.
description_zh: 该技能连接设计与开发，从Figma提取组件和设计令牌，将其转换为可用于生产的React代码，并自动化设计到代码的工作流程。

name: focus-session-manager
author: daffy0208
description: Automatically manage focus sessions, breaks, and hyperfocus protection. Uses ADHD-optimized Pomodoro technique with flexible timers, health reminders, and gentle interruptions. Protects against hyperfocus burnout while maximizing productive time.
description_zh: 一款使用ADHD优化番茄工作法的自动专注会话管理器。它跟踪工作时间，在自然停顿点建议休息，并提供温和提醒以防止过度专注导致的倦怠并保护健康，从而最大化高效心流。

name: forensic-data-engineer
author: daffy0208
description: Expert in data forensics, anomaly detection, audit trail analysis, fraud detection, and breach investigation
description_zh: 一项专业技能，用于调查数据异常、检测欺诈、分析审计跟踪，并通过取证分析和安全协议确保数据完整性和合规性。

name: framework-orchestrator
author: daffy0208
description: Meta-skill that coordinates all frameworks and skills throughout the project lifecycle, providing intelligent sequencing based on project patterns
description_zh: 一个元技能，用于在整个项目生命周期中协调所有其他技能和框架。它分析项目复杂性、识别模式，并为执行排序最优的方法和工具。

name: frontend-builder
author: daffy0208
description: Build modern React/Next.js frontends. Use when creating web applications, choosing frontend stack, structuring components, or implementing UI/UX designs. Covers React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and component patterns.
description_zh: 该技能协助构建现代化的React/Next.js前端应用。它提供框架选择、组件架构、状态管理以及创建可维护高性能Web界面的最佳实践指导。

name: go-to-market-planner
author: daffy0208
description: Plan product launches and go-to-market strategy. Use when launching products, entering new markets, or planning marketing campaigns. Covers positioning, channels, messaging, and launch execution.
description_zh: 该技能通过涵盖市场定位、信息传递、渠道选择、时间线协调和成功指标的五阶段结构化策略，帮助规划和执行产品发布。

name: growth-experimenter
author: daffy0208
description: Run systematic growth experiments to increase acquisition, activation, retention, and revenue. Use when optimizing conversion funnels, running A/B tests, improving metrics, or when users mention growth, experimentation, optimization, or scaling user acquisition.
description_zh: 该Claude技能提供了一个系统框架，用于设计、运行和分析数据驱动的增长实验，以优化用户获取、激活、留存和收入。

name: iot-developer
author: daffy0208
description: Expert in IoT development, microcontrollers, sensors, and MQTT protocols
description_zh: 该技能提供物联网开发支持，包括微控制器编程、传感器集成、MQTT通信，以及为家庭或工业应用创建智能解决方案。

name: knowledge-base-manager
author: daffy0208
description: Design, build, and maintain comprehensive knowledge bases. Bridges document-based (RAG) and entity-based (graph) knowledge systems. Use when building knowledge-intensive applications, managing organizational knowledge, or creating intelligent information systems.
description_zh: 该技能帮助设计、构建和维护全面的知识库，桥接基于文档（RAG）和基于实体（图）的系统，用于智能信息管理和应用开发。

name: knowledge-graph-builder
author: daffy0208
description: Design and build knowledge graphs. Use when modeling complex relationships, building semantic search, or creating knowledge bases. Covers schema design, entity relationships, and graph database selection.
description_zh: 此技能帮助设计和构建知识图谱，用于建模复杂关系、实现语义搜索和创建结构化知识库。涵盖本体设计、图数据库选择和实施阶段。

name: livestream-engineer
author: daffy0208
description: Expert in live streaming, WebRTC, and real-time video/audio
description_zh: 该技能提供直播技术、WebRTC实现和实时广播的专业知识。它协助构建视频通话、屏幕共享以及类似Twitch的流媒体平台和网络研讨会。

name: localization-engineer
author: daffy0208
description: Expert in internationalization (i18n), multi-language support, and localization
description_zh: 此Claude技能提供国际化(i18n)和本地化(l10n)的专业知识，用于构建多语言应用。涵盖文本翻译、日期/数字格式化、RTL支持，并提供实践指南，特别是针对使用next-intl等库的Next.js框架。

name: manifest-generator
author: daffy0208
description: Auto-generate capability manifests from skill/MCP descriptions using Codex-powered semantic analysis and structured extraction.
description_zh: 该Claude技能利用OpenAI Codex分析技能、MCP和工具的描述与代码，自动生成能力清单。它推断前提条件、效果、领域和风险等级，以简化编排和验证流程。

name: mobile-developer
author: daffy0208
description: Expert in React Native, Expo, and cross-platform mobile development
description_zh: 该Claude技能提供使用React Native和Expo进行跨平台移动应用开发的专家指导，涵盖应用创建、导航、UI组件、性能优化以及发布到应用商店。

name: multi-agent-architect
author: daffy0208
description: Design and orchestrate multi-agent systems. Use when building complex AI systems requiring specialization, parallel processing, or collaborative problem-solving. Covers agent coordination, communication patterns, and task delegation strategies.
description_zh: 该技能用于设计和编排多智能体AI系统，以处理需要专业化、并行处理或协作解决问题的复杂任务，涵盖智能体协调、通信模式和任务委派策略。

name: mvp-builder
author: daffy0208
description: Rapid MVP development and feature prioritization for fast product validation. Use when building minimum viable products, prioritizing features, validating ideas quickly, or when users need to ship products fast while avoiding over-engineering.
description_zh: 一个用于快速构建最小可行产品（MVP）以验证想法的技能。它提供了功能优先级排序框架、实用的MVP模式和技术栈建议，帮助在数周内而非数月内发布产品，避免过度设计。

name: orchestration-planner
author: daffy0208
description: Plan multi-step workflows using capability graph and Codex-powered goal decomposition with HTN-style hierarchical task planning.
description_zh: 该技能使用AI分析和分层任务规划，将高级目标分解为可执行的工作流。它能将目标与可用能力匹配，验证前提条件，并生成带备选方案的优化多步骤计划。

name: performance-optimizer
author: daffy0208
description: Optimize application performance and scalability. Use when investigating slow applications, scaling bottlenecks, or improving response times. Covers profiling, caching, database optimization, and frontend performance.
description_zh: 该Claude技能帮助开发者通过系统化的性能剖析、测量，并针对前端、后端和数据库的瓶颈进行优化，以提升应用性能和可扩展性。

name: product-analyst
author: daffy0208
description: Track user metrics and provide data-driven insights for product decisions. Use when measuring product health, analyzing user behavior, conducting cohort analysis, or optimizing key metrics. Covers acquisition, engagement, retention, revenue metrics, and data-driven decision making.
description_zh: 该技能提供用于追踪用户行为、衡量产品健康状况的框架与指标，并提供数据驱动的洞察，以指导产品在获客、激活、参与和留存等方面的决策。

name: product-strategist
author: daffy0208
description: Validate product-market fit and strategic direction. Use when defining new products, validating problem-solution fit, prioritizing features, or making build-vs-buy decisions. Focuses on discovery and validation before development.
description_zh: 该技能通过结构化的五阶段流程，帮助验证产品市场契合度，专注于基于证据的问题、解决方案和市场验证，以降低开发风险并确保战略一致性。

name: prototype-designer
author: daffy0208
description: Create interactive prototypes, design user flows, implement prototype testing strategies, and manage handoff to development. Validate ideas before building.
description_zh: 该技能指导用户在开发前创建交互式原型以验证设计想法。涵盖工具选择、用户流程设计和测试策略，旨在提升产品成果。

name: prp-generator
author: daffy0208
description: Guides creation of Product Requirements Prompts (PRPs) - comprehensive requirement documents that serve as the foundation for AI-assisted development
description_zh: 该技能指导用户创建结构化的产品需求提示（PRP），用于AI辅助开发，将模糊的想法转化为全面、可执行的需求文档。

name: quality-assurance
author: daffy0208
description: Comprehensive quality assurance combining testing strategy, code quality enforcement, and validation gates. Consolidated from testing-strategist, code-quality-enforcer, and validation-gate-checker.
description_zh: 一个综合性的质量保证技能，结合了测试策略设计、代码质量检查和阶段验证门禁，以确保软件经过充分测试、可维护且具备生产就绪状态。

name: quality-auditor
author: daffy0208
description: Comprehensive quality auditing and evaluation of tools, frameworks, and systems against industry best practices with detailed scoring across 12 critical dimensions
description_zh: 一个全面的审计工具，基于行业最佳实践，使用严格的1-10分评分系统，从12个关键维度评估软件工具、框架和系统的质量。

name: rag-implementer
author: daffy0208
description: Implement retrieval-augmented generation systems. Use when building knowledge-intensive applications, document search, Q&A systems, or need to ground LLM responses in external data. Covers embedding strategy, vector stores, retrieval pipelines, and evaluation.
description_zh: 一项用于实现检索增强生成（RAG）系统的技能，指导用户从验证RAG需求到构建生产就绪的知识密集型应用，如文档搜索和问答系统。

name: release-manager
author: daffy0208
description: Ship features safely with progressive rollouts, feature flags, and canary deployments. Use when deploying risky features or need gradual rollouts.
description_zh: 一个用于管理软件发布的工具，支持渐进式发布、功能开关以及蓝绿和灰度部署策略。包含检查清单、监控和回滚计划，确保功能安全上线。

name: security-architect
author: daffy0208
description: Comprehensive security architecture combining threat modeling, security-first design, secure coding review, and compliance validation. Consolidated from threat-modeling, security-first-design, secure-coding-review, and compliance-validator.
description_zh: 一项全面的安全架构技能，整合了威胁建模、安全设计原则、代码漏洞审查和合规性验证，旨在将安全性融入整个开发生命周期。

name: security-engineer
author: daffy0208
description: Implement security best practices across the application stack. Use when securing APIs, implementing authentication, preventing vulnerabilities, or conducting security reviews. Covers OWASP Top 10, auth patterns, input validation, encryption, and security monitoring.
description_zh: 该Claude技能提供安全工程专业知识，用于在整个应用栈中实施身份验证、授权、输入验证和漏洞预防，遵循OWASP最佳实践。

name: skill-validator
author: daffy0208
description: Validates that a skill or MCP implementation matches its manifest by running Codex-powered semantic comparisons across descriptions, preconditions, effects, and API surface.
description_zh: 该技能通过使用Codex对描述、前提条件、效果和API接口进行语义比较，验证技能或MCP实现是否与其清单匹配，以检测偏差并确保质量。

name: spatial-developer
author: daffy0208
description: Expert in AR/VR, WebXR, and spatial computing for Vision Pro and web
description_zh: 该技能提供开发AR/VR、WebXR和空间计算应用的专家指导，包括Vision Pro原生应用和使用Three.js、React Three Fiber等框架的沉浸式3D网页体验。

name: supabase-developer
author: daffy0208
description: Build full-stack applications with Supabase (PostgreSQL, Auth, Storage, Real-time, Edge Functions). Use when implementing authentication, database design with RLS, file storage, real-time features, or serverless functions.
description_zh: 该技能帮助开发者使用Supabase构建全栈应用，涵盖PostgreSQL数据库设计、身份验证、文件存储、实时功能和边缘函数等核心功能。

name: system-diagnostician
author: daffy0208
description: Performs Codex-assisted project health diagnostics, identifies capability gaps, and produces prioritized improvement plans.
description_zh: 该技能使用Codex分析软件项目健康状况，识别问题、能力差距和反模式，然后生成带有影响/工作量评估的优先改进计划。

name: task-breakdown-specialist
author: daffy0208
description: Break large tasks into ADHD-friendly micro-tasks that minimize activation energy and maximize momentum. Use when feeling overwhelmed, can't start a task, or need to make progress visible. Optimized for ADHD developers with 15-minute task chunking and dopamine-driven ordering.
description_zh: 该技能使用2-5-15-30分钟模式，将令人望而生畏的任务分解为适合ADHD的微任务。它旨在降低启动能量，通过快速胜利建立动力，并使进度可视化，特别为开发者和ADHD人群优化。

name: technical-writer
author: daffy0208
description: Create clear, comprehensive technical documentation for developers and users. Use when documenting APIs, writing user guides, creating tutorials, or setting up documentation sites. Covers API docs, user guides, architecture documentation, and documentation best practices.
description_zh: 此技能帮助为开发者和用户创建清晰全面的技术文档，涵盖API文档、用户指南、教程和最佳实践，旨在提高产品易用性并减少支持负担。

name: testing-strategist
author: daffy0208
description: Design and implement comprehensive testing strategies. Use when setting up tests, choosing test types, implementing TDD, or improving code quality. Covers unit tests, integration tests, E2E tests, test-driven development, and testing best practices.
description_zh: 此技能帮助开发者设计和实施全面的测试策略，涵盖单元测试、集成测试和端到端测试。它提供最佳实践、示例和测试金字塔原则，以提高代码质量和开发信心。

name: usability-tester
author: daffy0208
description: Conduct usability tests and identify UX issues through systematic observation. Use when testing user flows, validating designs, identifying friction points, or ensuring users can complete core tasks. Covers test planning, think-aloud protocol, task scenarios, and severity rating.
description_zh: 该技能通过观察用户完成任务，进行系统性可用性测试以识别用户体验问题。涵盖测试规划、有声思维协议、任务场景和严重性评级，以提升用户体验。

name: user-researcher
author: daffy0208
description: Conduct user research and validation. Use when discovering user needs, validating assumptions, creating personas, or understanding pain points. Covers interviews, surveys, analysis, and synthesis.
description_zh: 一个系统性的用户研究指南，通过访谈、调查和分析来验证假设、理解用户需求，为产品开发提供依据。

name: ux-designer
author: daffy0208
description: Design user experiences and interfaces. Use when creating user journeys, wireframes, prototypes, or improving usability. Covers user flows, information architecture, interaction design, and accessibility.
description_zh: 该技能指导用户完成完整的用户体验设计流程，涵盖信息架构、用户流程、线框图、原型设计和用户界面设计，重点关注可访问性和以用户为中心的原则。

name: video-producer
author: daffy0208
description: Expert in video playback, streaming, and video player customization
description_zh: 此Claude技能专注于构建自定义视频播放器，实现自适应流媒体（HLS/DASH），并添加字幕、画质选择和直播等功能，以打造引人入胜的视频体验。

name: visual-designer
author: daffy0208
description: Design beautiful, consistent user interfaces with proper color theory, typography, spacing, and visual hierarchy. Use when creating design systems, choosing colors and fonts, or establishing visual direction. Covers color theory, typography scales, spacing systems, and design principles.
description_zh: 该技能为创建美观、一致的用户界面提供全面指导，涵盖色彩理论、字体排版、间距系统和设计原则，用于建立有效的视觉方向和设计系统。

name: voice-interface-builder
author: daffy0208
description: Expert in building voice interfaces, speech recognition, and text-to-speech systems
description_zh: 此技能专注于使用Web Speech API构建语音界面，涵盖语音识别、文本转语音合成和语音UI开发，用于创建无障碍、免提操作的应用程序。
